care.summary: A beautiful trailing succulent with long cascading stems covered in plump, overlapping blue-green bead-like leaves.
care.light: Bright indirect to direct light; at least 4 hours of bright light needed
care.water: Water thoroughly when soil is completely dry; every 2-3 weeks in summer, monthly in winter
care.soil: Very well-draining cactus/succulent mix with coarse sand or pumice
care.fertilizer: Dilute succulent fertilizer once in spring and once in summer only
common_issues: Leaves falling off at the slightest touch — handle gently
Root rot from overwatering — the most common killer
Stem rot from water sitting on leaves
tips: Water from the bottom by soaking the pot to avoid wetting leaves
Repot only when absolutely necessary — leaves fall easily
Propagate by placing fallen leaves on dry succulent mix
Hang in a bright window for the most beautiful cascading effect
